label: The Shardlock Cellar
description: The Shardlock Cellar occupies a low, wedge-shaped chamber behind the Prismworn Cask’s basalt-glass vault, sealed with dust-gasketed panels that blunt the escarpment’s chill drafts. Racks of leaded crystal crates and mirror-slag kegs line the walls in strict bands, their faces scored with seam-line indices that preserve the tavern’s calibrated sightlines even in storage. A narrow condenser runnel cuts along the floor to a sump of reflective fines, keeping the air mineral-dry and leaving a persistent metallic brightness on the black glass. Prism-baffled lamps throw fractured copper-white glints across numbered niches, rendering inventories legible without spoiling the room’s measured hush.
